steps: Go to https://www.mollie.com/dashboard and create an account (or log in)
Complete the onboarding including business verification
You will see both a 'Test API key' (prefixed test_) and a 'Live API key' (prefixed live_)
Copy the appropriate key for your environment

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Mollie API key — use test_ key for testing, live_ key for production

notes: Test API keys are prefixed with 'test_' and live keys with 'live_'
Use the test key in sandbox mode; no real payments are processed
Live key requires completing Mollie account verification and approval
The key is sent in the Authorization header as 'Bearer <your_key>'
Strong European payment method coverage: iDEAL, Bancontact, SEPA, etc.

test_endpoint.description: List available payment methods to verify credentials
